title: DeepSchema Definition
description: Schema for deepschema.yml files used to define file-level schemas with requirements, validation, and review generation.

requirements.description: RFC 2119 keyed requirements. Keys are requirement names, values are descriptions using MUST, SHOULD, etc.

parent_deep_schemas.description: Names of parent DeepSchemas whose requirements are inherited.

json_schema_path.description: Relative path to a JSON Schema file to enforce on matched files.

verification_bash_command.description: Bash commands to run on the file for verification. Each string is a separate command.

summary.description: High-level summary of the schema type. Used for search/discovery.

instructions.description: General instructions for dealing with files of this type.

examples.description: Example files of this type done well.

path.description: Relative path from the definition file to the example.

description.description: Description of what makes this a good example.

references.description: Reference files or URLs for detailed guidance.

path.description: Relative path or URL to the reference.

description.description: Description of what this reference covers.

matchers.description: Glob patterns declaring which files this schema applies to.
